query: Analyze the aerodynamic performance of a rectangular wing with span 12 m, root chord 1.5 m, twist_cp=[0.0, 0.0] (2 control points), sweep 0 deg, taper 1.0, dihedral 0.0 deg, t/c 0.12. Use viscous drag, no wave drag. Sweep alpha from -10 to 15 deg at Mach 0.3 and Mach 0.5 at sea level (rho=1.225 kg/m3). Plot drag polars and L/D vs alpha.

Analyze a fully designed swept wing: span 30 m, root chord 3 m, twist_cp=[-2.0, 0.0, 3.0] (3 control points, tip washed out), sweep 25 deg, taper 0.4, dihedral 3.0 deg, t/c_cp=[0.14, 0.12] (2 CPs). Use viscous and wave drag. Conditions: Mach 0.7 and Mach 0.8, alpha -5 to 10 deg, rho=0.38 kg/m3. Plot drag polars and spanwise lift distribution at trim.

Analyze a high-aspect-ratio wing designed for low-speed soaring: span 20 m, root chord 1.2 m, twist_cp=[0.0, -2.0, -4.0] (3 CPs, washout toward tip), chord_cp=[1.0, 0.9, 0.7] (3 CPs, tapered chord), sweep 5 deg, dihedral 5 deg, t/c 0.15. Viscous drag, no wave drag. Mach 0.1 and 0.2, alpha -5 to 20 deg, rho=1.225 kg/m3. Plot L/D vs alpha and drag polars.

Analyze a transonic transport wing: span 35 m, root chord 4.0 m, twist_cp=[2.0, 0.0, -1.5] (3 CPs), chord_cp=[1.0, 0.85, 0.6] (3 CPs), sweep 30 deg, taper 0.3, dihedral 6 deg, t/c_cp=[0.12, 0.10, 0.09] (3 CPs). Viscous and wave drag. Mach 0.75 and 0.85, alpha -3 to 8 deg, rho=0.38 kg/m3. Plot drag polars and spanwise Cl distribution at Mach 0.85 alpha=3 deg.

Minimize drag on a rectangular wing with span 10 m and root chord 2 m at Mach 0.5, sea-level density. Design variables: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), twist_cp (3 control points, -10 to 10 deg). Constrain CL = 0.5. Report final CD and alpha.

Minimize CD of a rectangular wing with span 20 m, root chord 3 m at Mach 0.5 sea level. Design variables: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), taper (0.2 to 1.0), sweep (-5 to 35 deg). Constraints: CL = 0.55. Report optimal sweep and taper.

Minimize drag on a rectangular wing (span 15 m, chord 2.5 m) at Mach 0.6, rho=0.6 kg/m3. Design variables: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), sweep (-20 to 40 deg), twist_cp (3 CPs, -8 to 8 deg). Constraint: CL = 0.45. Viscous drag on.

Minimize total drag of a CRM wing over two flight conditions: point 0 at Mach 0.84 rho=0.38 kg/m3 with CL=0.45, point 1 at Mach 0.84 rho=0.38 kg/m3 with CL=0.5. Design variables: alpha per point (bounds -10 to 10 deg), twist (5 control points, -5 to 8 deg). No span or area constraints.

Two-point drag minimization on a CRM wing. Point 0: Mach 0.84, rho=0.38, CL=0.44. Point 1: Mach 0.84, rho=0.38, CL=0.54. DVs: alpha per point (-15 to 15 deg), twist_cp (5 CPs, -5 to 8 deg). Objective: minimize sum of CD across both points.

Minimize fuel burn of a CRM wing using tube FEM (E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield=500 MPa, safety factor 2.5, mrho=3000 kg/m3). Flight: Mach 0.84, v=248 m/s, rho=0.38 kg/m3, W0=120000 kg, R=11165 km, CT=17e-6/s. DVs: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), twist (5 CPs, -10 to 15 deg), thickness (3 CPs, 0.01 to 0.5 m). Constraints: structural failure <= 0, L=W.

Aerostructural optimization of a CRM wing with tube spar (E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield=500 MPa, safety=2.5). Cruise: Mach 0.84, rho=0.38 kg/m3, W0=100000 kg, range 9000 km, CT=17e-6/s. DVs: alpha, twist (5 CPs), tube thickness (3 CPs, 0.005 to 0.3 m). Minimize fuelburn. Constraints: no structural failure, lift equals weight.

Minimize fuel burn of a uCRM wingbox wing at Mach 0.85, rho=0.348 kg/m3. Use aluminum (E=73.1 GPa, G=27.5 GPa, yield=420 MPa, safety=1.5, mrho=2780 kg/m3). W0=128000 kg, reserve fuel 15000 kg, range 14307 km, CT=0.53/3600/s. DVs: twist (4 CPs, -15 to 15 deg), spar thickness (4 CPs, 0.003 to 0.1 m), skin thickness (4 CPs, 0.003 to 0.1 m), t/c (4 CPs, 0.07 to 0.2), alpha_maneuver, fuel_mass. Constraints: CL=0.5 at cruise, structural failure <= 0 at maneuver (load factor 2.5), fuel volume delta >= 0.

Run a wingbox aerostructural optimization on a uCRM wing. Cruise: Mach 0.85, rho=0.348. Maneuver: load factor 2.5. Aluminum: E=73.1 GPa, yield=420 MPa, safety=1.5, mrho=2780 kg/m3. W0=128000 kg, Wf_reserve=15000 kg, R=14307 km, CT=0.53/3600/s. DVs: twist (4 CPs), spar_thickness (4 CPs, 0.003-0.1 m), skin_thickness (4 CPs, 0.003-0.1 m), t_over_c (4 CPs), alpha_maneuver, fuel_mass. Minimize fuelburn. Constraints: CL=0.5, failure<=0, fuel_vol_delta>=0, fuel_diff=0.

Minimize the structural mass of a CRM wing tube spar under a uniform nodal load of 2e5 N at all nodes. Material: E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield=500 MPa, safety factor 2.5, density 3000 kg/m3. DV: thickness_cp (3 control points, 0.01 to 0.5 m). Constraints: structural failure <= 0, thickness does not intersect airfoil.

Find the minimum mass tube spar for a CRM wing loaded with 5e4 N per node. Material: E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield=500 MPa, safety=2.5, mrho=3000 kg/m3. DV: thickness_cp (3 CPs, 0.005 to 0.3 m). Constraints: failure <= 0, no thickness intersection. Report final structural mass.
